gatewayRequired: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use chat. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

welcome.title: GeeClaw Chat
welcome.subtitle: Your AI assistant is ready. Start a conversation below.
welcome.channelPrompt: You can also start a conversation from these chat tools

toolbar.temporarySessionExpireHint: Chats are auto-deleted the next day

notes.identity: The agent reads this file to understand itself
notes.master: The agent reads this file to understand you
notes.soul: The agent reads this file to shape its persona and response style
notes.memory: The agent reads and writes memory here

lockedManaged.identity: Managed agents do not support editing this file.
lockedManaged.default: This file is locked for managed agents.

placeholders.identity:
[Agent Identity]
Name: Nova
Role: Your always-on intelligent life assistant
Traits: steady, clear, reliable, action-oriented
placeholders.master:
[User Profile]
Preferred name: Captain
Profile: I am a frontend engineer who loves iced americanos and is trying indie hacking lately.
placeholders.soul:
[Core Drive]
Write the unique spirit, tone, and behavioral principles you want to inject into this agent.
placeholders.memory:
[Memory Log]
- User preferences:
- Current goals:
- Long-term constraints:

agentSettingsDialog.title: Agent Settings
agentSettingsDialog.description: Manage this agent's profile, skills, and memory.

identity.label: Identity
identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Defines how this agent sees itself.

soul.label: Soul
soul.title: Soul
soul.description: Guides tone, personality, and response style.

memory.label: Long-term Memory
memory.title: Long-term Memory
memory.description: Persistent facts the agent should retain.

ownerProfile.label: Owner Profile
ownerProfile.title: Owner Profile
ownerProfile.placeholder: Owner profile details will appear here.

sessionPanel.title: Sessions
sessionPanel.mainSessionHint: Long-lived context that stays with this agent
sessionPanel.temporarySessionHint: A separate chat branch for one-off tasks
sessionPanel.draftTemporarySessionHint: It will appear in the list after the first message is sent
sessionPanel.emptyTemporarySessionsHint: Create a separate chat to keep one-off work away from the main thread
sessionPanel.emptyCronRunsHint: Runs from this agent's scheduled tasks will appear here

composer.agentPickerTitle: Route the next message to another agent

skillRecommendation.title: Use the {{skill}} skill in this prompt

composer.tip: Tip: use `@agent-id` to route the next message and `/` to insert inline skills.
composer.cronFallbackPlaceholder: This scheduled task run does not have a live session to continue.

descriptions.workspaceOnly: Only access files in the current working directory

moderate.label: Default
moderate.description: Keeps common abilities for most people

strict.label: Strict
strict.description: Close to chat-only, without file access or automation

fullAccess.label: Chaos Mode
fullAccess.description: Fewest limits, with the highest mistake risk

contextUsage.label: Context usage
contextUsage.stale: Session stats are waiting for refresh

auth.loginRequiredToSend: You are not signed in. Please sign in to send messages.
